critical.title: Title Tag Issues
critical.description: 2 pages have missing, too long, or too short title tags
critical.recommendation: Ensure every page has a unique title tag between 10-60 characters

critical.title: Missing H1 Tags
critical.recommendation: Every page should have exactly one H1 tag that describes the main topic

critical.title: Missing Mobile Viewport
critical.description: 2 pages lack mobile viewport meta tag

warnings.title: Meta Description Issues
warnings.description: 17 pages have missing or poorly optimized meta descriptions
warnings.recommendation: Write compelling meta descriptions between 50-160 characters

warnings.title: Thin Content
warnings.recommendation: Expand thin pages with comprehensive, valuable content

warnings.title: Weak Semantic Coverage
warnings.description: 17 pages have shallow topical depth or low semantic coverage
warnings.recommendation: Expand pages around the primary topic, related entities, questions, and supporting subtopics

warnings.title: Low ORB Semantic Space Score
warnings.description: 16 pages cover less than 65% of their expected semantic space
warnings.recommendation: Add missing entities, questions, supporting subtopics, and schema-aligned language

warnings.title: Missing Canonical Tags
warnings.recommendation: Add canonical tags to prevent duplicate content issues

warnings.title: Repeated Template or Boilerplate Pattern
warnings.description: 1 repeated page template clusters were detected
warnings.recommendation: Differentiate page body copy, titles, meta descriptions, and section structure for pages sharing a template

warnings.title: Potential Orphan Pages
warnings.description: 17 crawled pages have no incoming links from other crawled pages
warnings.recommendation: Link these pages from navigation, hub pages, or related body content

opportunities.title: Weak Internal Link Distribution
opportunities.description: 17 pages have fewer than two internal outgoing links
opportunities.recommendation: Add contextual internal links to relevant service, category, and supporting content pages
